LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LUISA PANGANIBAN, ROWENA PANGANIBAN, DEBBIE JIMENEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT-MOVING PARTY. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD - OVERRULED. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION - OVERRULED. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT - OVERRULED. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE - OVERRULED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS - OVERRULED. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS - OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO. REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
